PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANZEK, MICHAEL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HANZEK'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT PATRICK MALKASSIAN AND TO ADD PARTY DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE THE PROPOSED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COURTS ARE BOUND TO APPLY A GREAT LIBERALITY IN PERMITTING AMENDMENTS TO THE COMPLAINT ABSENT PREJUDICE TO THE ADVERSE PARTY. (ATKINSON V. ELK CORP. (2003) 109 CAL.APP.4TH 739, 761.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

To Amend Complaint To Correct Name Of Defendant
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HANZEK's Motion To Amend Complaint To Correct Name Of Defendant Patrick Malkassian and to add party Defendant is Granted. Plaintiff may file the proposed First Amended Complaint within 10 days of entry of this Order. Courts are bound to apply a great liberality in permitting amendments to the complaint absent prejudice to the adverse party. (Atkinson v. Elk Corp. (2003) 109 Cal.App.4th 739, 761.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
